name: Super Tupper Bread for 1 1/2 Lb Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Add ingredients in order listed. All ingredients should be room temperature.
2. Fleishman Bread machine yeast in a jar is recommended.
3. Gold star Better for bread flour is recommended.
4. Also recommend careful measurements: spoon the flour into the measuring cup and level it off with a knife (avoiding packing the flour). Dipping the flour into the measuring cup packs it in, resulting in too much flour.
